docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHAEL THOMAS, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS, PANORAMIC INTERESTS, MANAGER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITYSPACES 333 LLC
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABUHAJAR, ROAA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-25-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROAA ABUHAJAR IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED ARABIC INTERPRETER NABIL ABDELFATTAH (#300907). DEFENDANT CITYSPACES 333 LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL THOMAS (DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS, PANORAMIC INTERESTS, MANAGER). NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT WHEREBY PLAINTIFF WILL DEPOSIT THE CURRENT CHECK. IF THE CHECK IS REJECTED, THEN PLAINTIFF WILL PROMPTLY CONTACT MICHAEL AND CINDY VIA THE PROVIDED EMAILS TO HAVE A NEW CHECK SENT VIA CERTIFIED MAIL. PROGRESS REPORT SET FOR MAY 25TH AT 1:30 PM. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE "DWP". NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-11-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROAA ABUHAJAR IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED ARABIC INTERPRETER FAWZI KADDOURA. DEFENDANT CITYSPACES 333 LLC IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DEEMS PROOF OF SERVICE - RETURNED CERTIFIED MAIL FILED 1-23-2023 IS IMPROPER. PROOF OF SERVICE SHOWS CLAIM WAS SERVED TO PATRICK KENNEDAY AT 333 12TH ST. STE 101, SF, CA 94103 ADDRESS WHICH IS INCORRECT, THE CORRECT ADDRESS FOR AGENT FOR SERVICE IS AS LISTED ON CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE LISTED AGENT AND CORRECT ADDRESS FOR SERVICE IS PATRICK KENNEDY AT 2539 TELEGRAPH AVE STE 101, BERKELEY, CA 94704. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO RESERVE CLAIM TO THE DEFENDANT AND REFILE PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY 11, 2023 AT 3:30 P.M. DEPT 506. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY ABUHAJAR, ROAA CITYSPACES 333 LLC
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,184.00 FILED BY ABUHAJAR, ROAA AS TO DEFENDANT CITYSPACES 333 LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [PATRICK KENNEDY ON BEHALF OF CITYSPACES 333 LLC] FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABUHAJAR, ROAA AS TO DEFENDANT CITYSPACES 333 LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-20-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITYSPACES 333 LLC
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
